task_domain.name: repo_maintenance
task_domain.label: Repo Maintenance
task_domain.reason: Workflow metadata matches repository maintenance or update work.

agentic_assessments.summary: This Repo Maintenance run consumed a heavy execution profile for its task shape.
agentic_assessments.recommendation: Compare this run to similar successful runs and trim unnecessary turns, tools, or write actions.

agentic_assessments.summary: The run showed signs of broad or weakly controlled agentic behavior.
agentic_assessments.recommendation: Tighten instructions, reduce unnecessary tools, or delay write actions until the workflow has stronger evidence.

agentic_assessments.summary: About 50% of this run's turns appear to be data-gathering that could move to deterministic steps.
agentic_assessments.recommendation: Move data-fetching work to frontmatter steps: (pre-agent) writing to /tmp/gh-aw/agent/ or post-steps: (post-agent) to reduce inference cost. See the Deterministic & Agentic Patterns guide.

agentic_assessments.summary: This Repo Maintenance run may not need a frontier model. A smaller model (e.g. gpt-4.1-mini, claude-haiku-4-5) could handle the task at lower cost.
agentic_assessments.recommendation: Try engine.model: gpt-4.1-mini or claude-haiku-4-5 in the workflow frontmatter.

policy_analysis.policy_summary: 7 rules, SSL Bump disabled, DLP disabled
